result.summary: Košík.cz exposes a public remote MCP server at `https://mcp.kosik.cz/mcp-openai/`, authenticated with OAuth 2.0 via its well-known authorization server metadata; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surfaces were found on the domain.
result.description: Košík.cz is an online grocery delivery service in the Czech Republic. Its site focuses on consumer shopping, and it also publishes an MCP endpoint for AI assistant integration.

kosik_mcp_oauth_client.label: Košík.cz MCP OAuth client
kosik_mcp_oauth_client.setup: For the Košík.cz MCP server, register an OAuth client at [dynamic client registration](https://mcp.kosik.cz/mcp-openai/register), then complete the OAuth authorization flow against [the authorization server metadata](https://mcp.kosik.cz/mcp-openai/.well-known/oauth-authorization-server). The metadata advertises `authorization_code` and `refresh_token` grants, `S256` PKCE, and client authentication methods `client_secret_post` or `client_secret_basic` for the token endpoint. Use the resulting bearer access token with the MCP server.
